voice_profile.character: middle-aged American male, low, calm, authoritative explainer (channel-consistent with prior episodes)
voice_profile.style: measured, restrained; lean into quiet menace on the mechanism reveal; warmth in the opening, sober in the ending
voice_profile.notes: Draft pass first (cheap voice) for timing; MASTER generation only after script LOCK and owner go (paid/metered, rules/11). Fit to 12:00 via small atempo on the assembled master, not by re-reading.

chunking_rule: One chunk per script paragraph / beat (VC-NNNN), so a single fix re-renders one chunk, not the whole track. Keep chunks <= ~60s.

chunks.text_ref: HOOK para 1-3 (the line / safe / one man saw a crime)
OPENING (trusted name; steadiness was the trick; takeaway promise; disclaimer)
ACT1 a (who Madoff was; legitimate firm; establishment)
ACT1 b (the invite-only club; the slow dependable climb)
ACT1 c (professionals fooled; the question 'how?'; 'wasn't really investing')
chunks.emphasis: hold silence before 'he wasn't really investing the money at all'

chunks.text_ref: ACT2 a (no real trades; money into a bank account)
ACT2 b (the Ponzi mechanism explained step by step)
ACT2 c (fabricated statements; trust deepens; new money is the only money)
ACT2 d ($65B myth -> ~$17.5B principal; the gap IS the scheme)
ACT2 e (the fatal math; can never stop growing)
ACT3 a (Markopolos; ran the numbers; five minutes)
ACT3 b (too smooth = impossible; rigged game analogy)
ACT3 c (warned the SEC repeatedly; nothing happened)
ACT3 d (OIG: failure not corruption; sleeping watchdog)
ACT3 e (couldn't last; that year was 2008)
ACT4 a (2008 panic; withdrawals; no vault)
ACT4 b (confession to sons; arrest Dec 2008)
ACT4 c (plea to 11 felonies; no trial)
chunks.emphasis: hold silence before 'a hundred and fifty years'

chunks.text_ref: ACT4 d (150 years; died in prison 2021)
ACT4 e (the surprising recovery; >90%, with honest caveat)
ENDING a (not 'don't trust anyone'; the sharper lesson)
ENDING b (return comes with risk; smoothness = warning)
ENDING c (analyst vs regulator; 'ask it'; subscribe/next CTA)

pronunciation_dictionary.ipa_or_respell: spell out: S-I-P-A (or 'SY-puh' if used as a word — pick one and keep consistent)

open_items: Lock script (resolve CLM-0004/0005/0009/0011 follow-ups) BEFORE master generation.
Confirm exact voice id/settings used on prior episodes for continuity.
status: draft_ready (master pending script lock + owner go)
